# Dental Den

> Multi-speciality dental clinic in Andheri West, Mumbai, led by Dr. Tanya Kusum (BDS, MDS), an oral & maxillofacial surgeon. The practice focuses on evidence-based, conservative, and pain-minimised dentistry with transparent pricing.

## About
- Name: Dental Den
- Founder / Lead Dentist: Dr. Tanya Kusum (BDS, MDS) — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgeon, Reg. No. A-43665
- Location: Andheri West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400053, India
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 72089 09768
- Hours: Monday–Saturday (please confirm exact times on the contact page)
- Rating: 4.9 stars (412+ verified Google reviews)
- Areas served: Andheri West, Lokhandwala, Shastri Nagar, Four Bungalows, Seven Bungalows

## Core Services
- [Dental Implants](https://dentalden.co/services/dental-implants.html): Single-tooth to full-arch (All-on-4 / All-on-6), immediate-load options, lifetime warranty on the post.
- [Cosmetic Dentistry](https://dentalden.co/services/cosmetic-dentistry.html): Smile makeovers, veneers, bonding, contouring, whitening.
- [Invisible Braces / Clear Aligners](https://dentalden.co/services/invisible-braces.html): Invisalign-certified, typically 6–14 months with virtual check-ins.
- [Full Mouth Reconstruction](https://dentalden.co/services/full-mouth-reconstruction.html): Staged multi-disciplinary rehabilitation of worn or compromised bites.
- [Root Canal Treatment](https://dentalden.co/services/root-canal-treatment.html): Single-sitting RCT with rotary endodontics.
- [Laser Dentistry](https://dentalden.co/services/laser-dentistry.html): Soft-tissue laser for gum contouring and faster healing.

- [Home](https://dentalden.co/)

- [Blog](https://dentalden.co/blog.html)

## Approach
Dental Den emphasises four commitments: conservative-first treatment (recommending less, not more), painless-by-default care, honest written pricing with no surprise bills, and treating every patient as a person rather than a case number.
